data.title: Coinbase Could be Near Multi-Billion Dollar Deal for Deribit: Bloomberg
data.description:
• Coinbase is in advanced discussions with leading global crypto derivatives exchange Deribit, reports Bloomberg.
  • Deribit earlier this year was reported to be valued in the $4 billion to $5 billion range.

data.title: German Regulator Identifies 'Deficiencies' in Ethena's USDe Stablecoin
data.description:
• Germany's financial regulator, BaFin, said that the deficiencies are related to the bank's business organization and violations of MiCA requirements.
  • Ethena said it will seek alternative regulatory frameworks.
  • ENA is down by 6.5% in the past 24 hours.

data.title: HK Asia Holdings Buys More Bitcoin in Hedge Against Depreciation of Fiat Currencies
data.description:
• HK Asia Holdings bought another 10 BTC, taking its total bitcoin holdings to 18.88 BTC
  • The purchase was funded from internal cash reserves.
  • The company cited bitcoin's potential as a hedge against fiat depreciation and a strategic move to diversify assets and embrace blockchain technology.

data.title: Crypto Whale Who Made Millions on Leverage Trading Is a Convicted Fraudster: ZachXBT
data.description:
• ZachXBT said that the identity of a trader who made millions betting with leverage is William Parker, a convicted fraudster that stole $1 million from two casinos in 2023.
  • On-chain data shows that the wallet in question had interacted with several crypto casinos.
  • The trader went long on BTC shortly before Donald Trump's announcement of a U.S. strategic crypto reserve.

data.title: CryptoQuant's Bull Score Index Falls to Two-Year Lows Signaling Pain for BTC Bulls
data.description:
• Bitcoin has experienced a significant 23% drop from its January peak of $109,000, sparking debates about the potential onset of a new bear market.
  • The Bull Score Index, a measure of Bitcoin's market health, is currently at a low 20, indicating a possible structural shift in market dynamics.
  • Investor profitability is decreasing, with U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs recording net outflows of $180 million in the past 30 days, suggesting a softening demand.

data.title: Strategy Raises $711M to Buy More Bitcoin in Upsized STRF Perpetual Offering
data.description:
• Strategy raised $711.2M via the sale of a new series of preferred stock.
  • The money is mostly expected to be used to purchase additional bitcoin.
  • The new acquisitions are likely to take Strategy's bitcoin holdings above 500,000 tokens.

data.title: This Indicator Supports Bullish Case in Bitcoin and Nasdaq, for Now
data.description:
• The ICE/BofA U.S. High Yield Index Option-Adjusted Spread (OAS), a key indicator of economic sentiment and corporate credit health, has receded from recent highs, supporting renewed risk-taking in crypto and equity markets,
  • The OAS, which measures the yield difference between high-yield corporate bonds and U.S. Treasury securities, has dropped to 3.2% from a six-month high of 3.4%.
  • However, analysts predict the OAS spread may widen in the coming weeks as the negative impact of Trump's tariffs becomes evident.

data.title: Hotter-Than-Expected Core Inflation in Japan Sparks Rate Hike Talk, Threatens Crypto
data.description:
• Japan’s headline inflation remains nearly 100 basis points above U.S. inflation, a divergence not seen since 2015, highlighting persistent domestic price pressures.
  • Elevated inflation fuels speculation of potential rate hikes by the Bank of Japan, which could have broader implications for global markets and risk assets like cryptocurrencies.

data.title: How Ether.fi Retained TVL as Restaking Lost Its Luster
data.description:
• Ether.fi has emerged as the dominant protocol in restaking, scooping 2.6 million ETH in deposits.
  • The company plans to become a neobank to rival the likes of Revolut, eventually offering services in the U.S.
  • Ether.fi CEO Silagadze attributes negative Ethereum sentiment to a continued attack by people at Solana.

data.title: Tether Ranks Among Top Buyers of U.S. Treasuries in 2024, Firm Says
data.description:
• USDT issuer Tether said it would rank as the seventh largest foreign net buyer of U.S. Treasury securities in 2024, surpassing countries like Canada, Mexico, and Germany.
  • The firm bought a net $33.1 billion worth of U.S. Treasury securities in the previous year, highlighting the growing influence of U.S. dollar stablecoins in the U.S. Treasury government debt market.
  • President Trump said on Thursday that "crypto will expand the dominance of the U.S. dollar."
